Dec 6, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Australia vs England 2nd Ashes Test Live Score

Australia and England are locked in a thrilling contest in the 2nd Ashes Test at the Gabba. Day 3 saw Australia’s batters capitalize on England’s inconsistent bowling, building a strong position.

However, a late evening fightback from England brought balance to the match, setting up an exciting finish in the coming days.
